headline: Anzu Robotics lawsuit enters critical window as FCC firmware cliff approaches 270 days — procurement officers sourcing Blue UAS thermal sensors face the highest near-term supply risk since 2024.

lead_story.title: FLIR Boson 640 Allocation Risk Crosses 84%
lead_story.body: The PIE ensemble model is now tracking FLIR Boson 640 allocation risk at 84% probability before Q4 2026. Three demand signals are converging simultaneously: AeroVironment Switchblade 600 production ramp, Ukraine USAI package continuations driving EO/IR sensor demand, and 16 active contract signals in the flags database referencing thermal sensor procurement. Only 3 Boson-specific units are tracked in the Forge DB against 43 total thermal cameras — an 18% concentration with no identified alternative at equivalent performance. The 6-week lag between USAI package announcement and Boson lead time spikes, documented in previous procurement cycles, suggests the window to lock pricing at current rates is approximately 4-6 weeks.
lead_story.action: Request firm pricing and lead time commitments from FLIR/Teledyne distributors this week. Evaluate Boson 320 as a partial substitute for non-640 applications to preserve 640 inventory for highest-priority programs.

gray_zone.status: CRITICAL — FCC Covered List, active retail inventory, DJI cloud infrastructure confirmed.
gray_zone.development: SkyRover scores 0.850 composite risk — the highest of any tracked entity. Security researcher Jon Sawyer confirmed the SkyRover app connects directly to DJI cloud infrastructure using identical encryption keys. Shell company filings identify SZ Knowact Robot Technology Co Ltd as the registered entity in DJI's home district (Nanshan, Shenzhen). Existing S1 and X1 inventory remains available at retail despite FCC Covered List placement — agencies may be purchasing unknowingly.
gray_zone.buyer_exposure: Any agency that purchased SkyRover S1 or X1 units at retail. No known government contract buyers identified, but consumer-to-government transfer risk is high given retail availability.
gray_zone.action: Audit all drone inventory for SkyRover/Knowact hardware. Units should be isolated from networks immediately — the DJI cloud connection is not user-controllable. Flag for legal review under NDAA §1709.

gray_zone.status: CRITICAL — Texas AG lawsuit active 47+ days, full product line discontinued, zero current products.
gray_zone.development: As of April 5, 2026, Anzu has filed no response to the Texas AG Collin County lawsuit (7 DTPA counts, filed Feb 18). The 47-day silence exceeds normal litigation response timelines and may indicate Anzu is preparing to cease operations rather than defend. The entire Raptor product line was discontinued February 10 — 8 days before the lawsuit — suggesting the discontinuation was anticipatory. XTI Aerospace (parent, XTIA) is trading at $2.10 with a -$35.6M net loss and $20M JPMorgan ABL facility secured in February.
gray_zone.buyer_exposure: Three confirmed government buyers: Little Rock PD (6 units), unidentified Iowa county sheriff (4 units), Arkansas state agency (2 units). Firmware remains under DJI cryptographic key control — DJI retains update authority over these devices.
gray_zone.action: Agencies operating Raptor units should ground them for security review. Request firmware attestation from Anzu — if no response within 14 days, treat as confirmation of DJI control. Preserve procurement records for potential AG inquiry.

gray_zone.status: HIGH — FCC Covered List as of Dec 22 2025, no new authorizations possible.
gray_zone.development: Specta Air teardown confirms identical PCBs to DJI Air 3 with the same DJI P1 chipset. RF emission reports differ only by date and logo. FCC Covered List placement means no new Specta Air models can receive authorization — existing inventory is the terminal supply. No legal action filed yet, but the FCC retroactive revocation authority (active since Oct 2025) creates ongoing compliance risk for existing units.
gray_zone.buyer_exposure: Agencies that purchased Specta Air units for ISR or inspection missions. Retroactive FCC revocation could make continued operation illegal without notice.
gray_zone.action: Check FCC authorization status of all Specta Air units quarterly. No new purchases. Begin identifying replacement platforms on the Blue UAS cleared list.

gray_zone.status: HIGH — NDAA §1709(a)(1), FCC Covered List Dec 2025, FCC revoked pre-ban authorizations Jan 2026.
gray_zone.development: Autel is the largest and most operationally embedded of the four tracked entities — significant public safety fleet deployment. FCC revoked certain pre-ban authorizations in January 2026 while Autel seeks reconsideration. The FCC firmware cliff (Jan 1 2027) is now 270 days out with no Autel compliance roadmap published. Unlike Anzu, Autel has proprietary (non-DJI) architecture — composite score 0.525 reflects lower supply chain dependency but regulatory risk is equivalent.
gray_zone.buyer_exposure: Substantial public safety exposure — Tulsa County Sheriff confirmed, multiple other law enforcement agencies. High operational dependency makes rapid transition difficult.
gray_zone.action: Request Autel's FCC compliance roadmap in writing. If no roadmap by July 1 2026, begin procurement planning for Blue UAS cleared alternatives (Skydio X10D for ISR, Joby/Shield AI for larger platforms). Budget FY27 replacement cycle now.

supply_chain.signal: 84% allocation probability before Q4 2026. 18% concentration (3/43 thermal cameras are Boson-specific). 16 contract flags. Cross-correlation with Ukraine USAI packages shows 6-week lead time lag.
supply_chain.window: 4-6 weeks before pricing moves. Allocation risk peak Q3 2026.
supply_chain.action: Lock distributor pricing this week. Evaluate Boson 320 substitution for sub-640 applications. Identify alternative: Seek DRS TAMARISK or L3Harris Micro-STAMP as emergency fallback.

supply_chain.signal: CRITICAL single-point-of-failure. Kaohsiung Xiaogang fire destroyed 50% of Molicel capacity — 1.5 GWh remaining. Only non-Chinese source for high-drain drone cells. No equivalent alternative at production scale.
supply_chain.window: Shortage active now. Capacity rebuild estimated 18-24 months.
supply_chain.action: Audit battery inventory. Order 6-month buffer stock immediately. Evaluate Chinese alternatives only if NDAA compliance is not required. Contact Molicel direct for allocation priority status.

supply_chain.signal: 82% allocation probability. 64% concentration (16/25 companion computers use Jetson silicon). 20 contract flags. 15 Blue UAS platforms scaling simultaneously against shared supply.
supply_chain.window: Q3 2026 risk window. NVIDIA AI datacenter priority creates structural competition for edge allocation.
supply_chain.action: Contact NVIDIA embedded sales for volume commitment pricing before Q2 2026 ends. Identify Qualcomm QRB5165 (via ModalAI VOXL 2) as primary fallback — already Blue UAS cleared.

watch_list.why: Three simultaneous FCC conditional approval deadlines converge on January 1 2027, potentially grounding all non-compliant gray zone drones. Oregon/NASAO white paper documents 467 drones already grounded across 25 states.
watch_list.trigger: Any FCC enforcement action before Jan 2027, or any gray zone manufacturer publishing a compliance roadmap (signals they intend to meet the deadline)

watch_list.why: 74% probability of allocation pressure as Neros Archer production scales to 2,200+ units/month. 42/322 flight controllers in Forge DB use STM32H7 — same silicon family as the defense FPV ramp.
watch_list.trigger: Lead time on STM32H743 exceeding 16 weeks at major distributors (currently ~6 weeks)

watch_list.why: 47-day lawsuit silence + discontinued product line + $35.6M net loss + $20M ABL facility = high insolvency risk. If Anzu files Chapter 11, government buyers lose any firmware support path.
watch_list.trigger: XTIA filing 8-K with going-concern language, or Anzu missing next earnings call (May 19 2026)

predictions.event: FLIR Boson 640 goes allocation-only for defense programs
predictions.hedge: Execute distributor pricing lock this week. Secure 6-month forward supply commitment. Begin qualifying Boson 320 for programs where 640 is not mission-critical.

predictions.event: FCC firmware cliff grounds non-compliant gray zone fleets Jan 2027
predictions.hedge: Audit all drone inventory against FCC Covered List now. Any agency with Autel, Anzu, SkyRover, or Cogito hardware should begin FY27 replacement budget process immediately. 270 days is not enough time to run a competitive procurement from scratch.

predictions.event: Gray zone enforcement event — federal action against buyer agencies or operators
predictions.hedge: Document all gray zone hardware purchases with justification memos. Brief legal counsel on NDAA §1709 exposure. Agencies with Anzu units specifically should consult with state AG offices given the active Texas passthrough legal theory.

signal_summary.top_concern: FLIR Boson 640 allocation + FCC firmware cliff convergence
